message:
feat(polyfills): add socket timeouts, chunked encoding, pause/resume queue, TLS server

- Socket timeouts: setTimeout() now fires 'timeout' event via native poll
- Chunked transfer encoding: HTTP server auto-uses Transfer-Encoding: chunked
- Pause/resume queue: data buffered when paused, flushed on resume
- Event-driven drain: poll POLLOUT for reliable backpressure handling
- TLS server: createServer() with certificate/key, server-side TLS 1.3 handshake
